rulings.Case Title: SAN DONG BEST INC. ET AL VS. GENERAL TSO KITCHEN, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 09,2020. line 3. DEFENDANT DAVID TSAO Amended DEMURRER to 4TH Amended COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. The Notice of Demurrer is unclear which causes of action Defendant is demurring to. On August 10, 2020 Defendant filed a Notice of Demurrer listing the second and the third causes of action. On August 24, 2020 Defendant filed in the same transaction an Amended Notice of Demurrer addressing the second and the third causes of action and a "Dismissal of Demurrer to Third Cause of Action of Fourth Amended Complaint." "Dismissal" was submitted for filing seconds before the Amended Demurrer. No Amended Points and Authorities were submitted to clarify whether demurrer is addressing both the second and the third causes of action. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRI COUNTIES BANK VS. CATHERINE CHOW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 09,2020. line 7. PLAINTIFF TRI COUNTIES BANK MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Memorandum Of Points And Authorities is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden.
